# Neighborhood Breadth Scan

This file is generated from `data/buildings.csv`.
Edit the CSV, not this markdown.

Status meanings:
- `candidate`: lightly screened only
- `research_complete`: desk research finished
- `tour_candidate`: worth touring now
- `backup`: viable but not a front-runner
- `finalist`: survives tours and cost review
- `rejected`: out unless new evidence emerges
